name: write-a-skill
description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.
intent_triggers: use the write a skill agent skill
run a workflow for write a skill
help me with write a skill
我需要處理 write a skill 相關工作
幫我啟用 write a skill 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 write a skill
use write a skill from sanity

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the write a skill skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
